introSection: Fyr & Flamme (English: Fire & Flame) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hunderfossen Eventyrpark in Fåberg, Oppland, Norway.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are themed to resemble two dragons. The dragons are named Fyr & Flamme and are owned by the king of Hunderfossen.

fullText:
Fyr & Flamme (English: Fire & Flame) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Hunderfossen Eventyrpark in Fåberg, Oppland, Norway.



Yellow track and green supports.

The trains are themed to resemble two dragons. The dragons are named Fyr & Flamme and are owned by the king of Hunderfossen.
